name: rabbit-spec
summary: Owner of the rabbit workflow's spec-lifecycle skills. Hosts rabbit-spec-create (drafts initial spec bodies via the read-only rabbit-spec-creator subagent) and rabbit-spec-update (revises existing specs; absorbed from rabbit-feature/rabbit-feature-spec).
deprecation_criterion: when Claude Code exposes native spec-lifecycle skills that supersede this feature
spec_no_change_reason: Spec amended this cycle (bumped 1.12.0 -> 1.13.0): #688 housekeeping round 2 — removal pass. Deleted dead stage/relocation narration from docs/spec.md (Purpose, Mode awareness section, verbose Surface bullets, per-test Tests prose) and the redundant Tech Stack prose from docs/contract.md; spec.md 221 -> 175 lines, contract.md 66 -> 62. New regression guard test-no-relocation-narration.py forbids the dead narration's return. Behaviour is unchanged.
